overall.description: A maritime simulation showing a ship's bridge view navigating through rough stormy seas at dusk. The vessel features working navigation displays and approaches an industrial harbor, briefly illuminated by a lightning flash that reveals distant cargo cranes.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bow cutting through open stormy sea

agents.ego_description: steadily piloting the vessel through rough seas while monitoring the radar and navigation displays

entered.detail: red-painted steel forecastle deck with anchor chains and bollards
metal safety railing along the port side of the bow
metal safety railing along the starboard side of the bow
left navigation monitor displaying electronic chart with yellow landmasses
center circular radar screen with rotating yellow sweep showing nearby contacts
right monitor displaying depth sounder data with orange-brown gradient
rough choppy sea surface with whitecaps and rolling swells
dark gray storm clouds covering the horizon

segments.scene_description: The ship maintains steady course through rough stormy waters, pitching slightly with the swells. Navigation monitors display active radar sweeps and chart data. The bow cuts through dark waves under an overcast stormy sky with no land visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship approaching industrial harbor during electrical storm

events.description: bright lightning flash brilliantly illuminates the entire scene revealing distant industrial harbor structures
scene returns to low light but industrial cranes remain visible as dark silhouettes against the horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing approach toward the harbor while navigating through heavy seas, monitoring radar for dock positioning

entered.detail: large cargo loading cranes silhouetted against the lightning-lit sky
industrial port buildings and warehouse facilities visible during the flash

segments.scene_description: A sudden lightning flash illuminates the scene, revealing an industrial harbor with cargo cranes dead ahead. The ship continues its approach through the storm as the scene returns to darkness, with the harbor infrastructure now visible as distant silhouettes on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a tumultuous open sea that gradually reveals a distant industrial destination. It begins with the ship pitching through rough, dark swells under an overcast stormy sky, while active radar sweeps and chart data flicker on the bridge monitors. As the vessel maintains its steady course through the void, a sudden, brilliant flash of lightning momentarily pierces the gloom to illuminate a harbor filled with cargo cranes dead ahead. The scene then shifts back into darkness, leaving the harbor infrastructure as looming silhouettes on the horizon as the ship continues its approach through the storm.
